notableEvents.label: Sal Stewart GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Sal Stewart grounds into a double play, third baseman Alex Bregman to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. Elly De La Cruz out at 2nd. Sal Stewart out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Cubs challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Edward Cabrera picks off Elly De La Cruz at 1st on throw to first baseman Michael Busch.
